title: Informal voice message
subtitle: Leave a natural short message with reason and plan.
duolingoBridge: B1 Output turns B1 knowledge into usable production: speaking, writing, summarizing native-style input, reacting, arguing, and self-correcting.
overview: Knowledge point 1: sound friendly and clear.
Knowledge point 2: include reason, proposal, and callback.

sections.title: Output tools
rows: call me back when you can

items.fr: Salut, je t’appelle parce que j’ai eu un petit imprévu.
items.en: Hi, I am calling because something unexpected came up.
items.es: Hola, te llamo porque tuve un pequeño imprevisto.

items.fr: Je vais finir le travail plus tard que prévu.
items.en: I am going to finish work later than planned.
items.es: Voy a terminar el trabajo más tarde de lo previsto.

items.fr: Ça te dirait de décaler notre café à dix-huit heures trente ?
items.en: Would you feel like moving our coffee to six thirty?
items.es: ¿Te gustaría cambiar nuestro café a las dieciocho treinta?

items.fr: Si ce n’est pas possible, on peut aussi remettre ça à demain.
items.en: If that is not possible, we can also do it tomorrow.
items.es: Si no es posible, también podemos dejarlo para mañana.

items.fr: Rappelle-moi quand tu peux, à tout à l’heure.
items.en: Call me back when you can, see you later.
